title: Moist Meaty Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A savory and dense Dutch dish featuring rosemary and lacquer-glaze, perfect for a low-calorie friendly meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked chicken, brown rice, rosemary, lacquer glaze, and chicken broth, and stir until well combined.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, add the chicken and rice mixture and top with shredded reduced-fat cheddar.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
